iotsitewise.asset.CfnAbout: Creates an asset from an existing asset model. For more information, see [Creating assets](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iot-sitewise/latest/userguide/create-assets.html) in the *AWS IoT SiteWise User Guide*.

iotsitewise.asset.AssetHierarchies.Description: A list of asset hierarchies that each contain a `hierarchyLogicalId`. A hierarchy specifies allowed parent/child asset relationships.

iotsitewise.asset.AssetModelId.Description: The ID of the asset model from which to create the asset.

iotsitewise.asset.AssetName.Description: A unique, friendly name for the asset.  The maximum length is 256 characters with the pattern `[^u0000-u001Fu007F]+`.

iotsitewise.asset.AssetProperties.Description: The list of asset properties for the asset.  This object doesn't include properties that you define in composite models. You can find composite model properties in the `assetCompositeModels` object.

iotsitewise.asset.Tags.Description: A list of key-value pairs that contain metadata for the asset. For more information, see [Tagging your AWS IoT SiteWise resources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iot-sitewise/latest/userguide/tag-resources.html) in the *AWS IoT SiteWise User Guide*.
